calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1143 Naples St)
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for petitioner.

Ms. Rasch stated that the proposed sale was for a 100% interest in the real property located at 1143 Naples Street, San Francisco, California, for the bid amount of $950,000.00, upon the terms and conditions of the report of sale filed with the court on November 16, 2015. There were no overbidders. Court asked if additional bond was needed. Ms. Rasch replied that there was a mortgage balance of over $700,000 remaining, and that with payment of brokers fees the net proceeds to the estate would be only $100,000, so that no increased bond was needed.
The sale was confirmed at $950,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond was required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
